$comment: Qdrant collection schema + payload shape for research-paper documents (P3 useful-work / scientific-compute direction). Embedding dimension 768 matches common sentence-transformer / scientific-text models; change `vectors.size` to match the model actually used.

point_shape.$comment: One Qdrant point per paper. `id` is a stable UUID/integer; the human DOI lives in payload. `vector` is the embedding of (title + abstract).

payload.title: Man's Greatest Achievement
payload.abstract: All perceptible matter comes from a primary substance filling all space, acted upon by a creative force, calling into existence all things and phenomena.
